g.text: GPU COPY ENGINE: ASYNCHRONOUS DMA ARCHITECTURE

ol.li: Memory Pinning (mlock): OS must lock virtual pages into RAM to provide stable physical addresses to the IOMMU.
Descriptor Rings: Copy engines poll command buffers for new transfer jobs without CPU intervention.
Zero-Copy Optimization: Unified Memory models allow bypassing discrete transfers using page migration.
TLP Protocol: Data is packetized; CE0/CE1 manage credit-based flow control on the PCIe bus.

ul.li: Payload: Up to 512 Bytes (Max Payload Size)
